llp_certificate_filing_date.description: Date the original certificate of limited liability partnership (MLLP-1 registration) was filed with the SOS. Anchor for renunciation timeline; entity-scoped because it identifies the entity's LLP-status registration date.

lineN.description: Free-text reason for filing the certificate of renunciation. Multi-line shape (lines 1–3 inline on MLLP-11R); same indexed-line primitive as upstream amendment.nature_and_text.lineN.

future_effective_date.description: Optional future effective date or time of renunciation, which must be a date or time certain. If blank, the renunciation is effective upon filing. Same primitive shape as conversion.future_effective_date / consolidation.future_effective_date / domestication.future_effective_date.

additional_info_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit containing additional information that the person filing the certificate of renunciation determines to be necessary (FOURTH).

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Combined printed name and capacity of an optional second authorized signer (Shape D). Numbering parallels the merger-form pattern (merger.parties[N].signature_block.signer_1/signer_2) and MLLC-17's filing.signer_2.printed_name_and_capacity.

Combined printed name and capacity of an optional third authorized signer (Shape D). Used when the §825 authority tier requires multiple signers (e.g., majority-in-interest of partners with three or more partners).

name.description: Name of an entity acting as an authorized §825 signer on behalf of the LLP (parallel block to filing.signer_N.* for natural-person signers, indexed 1–3). Distinct from filing.entities[N].name (which identifies which entity's filing is being submitted, on the cover letter).

signer_printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of an entity-signer (parallel to general_partner_entity_N.signer_printed_name_and_capacity on LP forms).

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
